tool_args.label: Transitway Curb-Aligned Two-way Bus Lanes
tool_args.raw_text: Two-way Transitway for length of 34th Street aligned along curb

payload.description: Two-way Transitway for length of 34th Street aligned along curb. Transitway occupies half of street, north half east of Fifth Avenue, south half west of Sixth Avenue, with a new plaza from Fifth to Sixth. Single side alignment selected based on street width and corridor needs.

tool_args.label: Transitway Cross-Section at Station
tool_args.raw_text: At stations: two 11-ft bus lanes, 10-ft transitway station, two 10-ft travel lanes, total 52-ft roadway

payload.description: At stations: two 11'-0" Bus Lanes, a 10'-0" Transitway Station, and two 10'-0" Travel Lanes. Total width 52'-0".

evidence_refs.source_quote: two 11'-0" Bus Lanes, a 10'-0" Transitway Station, and two 10'-0" Travel Lanes. The total width of the roadway is 52'-0"

tool_args.label: Transitway Cross-Section Between Stations
tool_args.raw_text: Between stations: two 11-ft bus lanes, 2-ft median, two 10-ft travel lanes, 8-ft parking lane, total 52-ft roadway

payload.description: Between stations: two 11'-0" bus lanes, 2'-0" median, two 10'-0" travel lanes, one 8'-0" parking lane. Total width 52'-0".

evidence_refs.source_quote: two bus lanes (11'-0" each), two travel lanes (10'-0" each), and one parking lane (8'-0"). A 2' wide median separates the bus lanes from the travel lanes. The total width of the roadway is 52'-0"

tool_args.label: Failed Alternatives (Streetcar, LRT, AGT, Heavy Rail)
tool_args.raw_text: Streetcar, LRT, AGT, and Heavy Rail alternatives failed primary screening

payload.claim_text: Streetcar, LRT, AGT, and Heavy Rail alternatives failed primary screening
payload.description: Streetcar, Light Rail Transit, Automated Guideway Transit, and Heavy Rail alternatives did not pass primary screening

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Streetcar: – Acquisition of property required for maintenance/storage facility – Loading/parking along 34 th Street completely restricted • LRT: – Does not improve express bus operations – Acquisition of property required for maintenance/storage facility – Loading/parking along 34 th Street completely restricted • AGT: – Construction costs and timeline do not meet Goals and Objectives – Visual impacts to streetscape – Does not improve express bus operations • Heavy Rail Alternative: – Construction costs and timeline do not meet Goals and Objectives – Does not improve express bus operations

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer
